title: File Download and Archive Transfer Flow

flow_1_single_file_download: User → ContextMenu: clicks 'Download' on a file
trigger_download → downloadFile: downloadFile(url, { anti_csrf, auth_token: puter.authToken })
downloadFile → Browser: createElement('iframe') + createElement('form'), form.action = '/down?path=...', method POST
downloadFile → Browser: appends hidden inputs (anti_csrf, auth_token), form.submit()
Browser → User: triggers file download via iframe form POST
flow_2_tar_creation_download: User → ContextMenu: clicks 'Download' on a directory
tarItems → UIWindowProgress: setTimeout 500ms → UIWindowProgress({ title:'tar', show_progress:true })
tarItems: blobToUint8Array(blob) → Uint8Array; builds files[] = [{name, content:Uint8Array, isDir}]
tarItems → createTar: createTar(files[]) → Uint8Array (512-byte header blocks + content + padding)
tarItems → Browser: [download=true] URL.createObjectURL(tarBlob), createElement('a'), a.click() → triggers download
tarItems → puter.fs: [download=false] puter.fs.write(targetDirPath/name.tar, tarBlob, { overwrite:false, dedupeName:true })
flow_3_tar_extraction: User → untarItem: untarItem(itemPath) — e.g. from context menu 'Extract'
untarItem → UIWindowProgress: setTimeout 500ms → UIWindowProgress({ title:'untar', show_progress:true })
untarItem → parseTar: parseTar(Uint8Array) → files[] = [{name, content:Uint8Array, isDir}]
untarItem: builds queuedFileWrites[] = [new File([blob], name)] for non-dir entries
untarItem → puter.fs: puter.fs.upload(queuedFileWrites, rootdir.path+'/', { createFileParent:true, generateThumbnails:true })
puter.fs → untarItem: success callback → progwin.set_progress(100), progwin.close() after delay
flow_4_undo_upload: undo_last_action: reads { operation, data } — if operation === 'upload'
undo_upload → delete_item_with_path: for each file path: delete_item_with_path(file)
delete_item_with_path → puter.fs: puter.fs.delete({ paths: path, descendantsOnly:false, recursive:true })

key_function_signatures.downloadFile: function downloadFile(url, postData = {}) — creates hidden iframe form POST
key_function_signatures.trigger_download: window.trigger_download = (paths: string[]) => void — fetches anti-CSRF then calls downloadFile per path
key_function_signatures.undo_last_action: window.undo_last_action = async () => void — dispatches to undo handlers map

key_relationships: ContextMenu/OpenItem depends_on trigger_download (for single file download)
tarItems calls createTar, puter.fs.read, puter.fs.write, readDirectoryRecursive
untarItem calls parseTar, puter.fs.read, puter.fs.mkdir, puter.fs.upload
important_notes: downloadFile uses hidden iframe + form POST (not fetch) to trigger browser's native download dialog
trigger_download constructs URL as: window.origin + '/down?path=' + paths[index]
Auth: anti_csrf token fetched from /get-anticsrf-token, puter.authToken used as auth_token in form POST
createTar: pure sync function — builds POSIX tar with 512-byte headers, octal size, checksum fields
parseTar: pure sync function — reads 512-byte headers, validates checksum (256 = EOF), extracts name/size/type
tarItems download=true branch: uses URL.createObjectURL + anchor click (no server); download=false: writes to puter.fs
untarItem always writes extracted files to puter.fs via puter.fs.upload with createFileParent:true
undo_upload deletes all uploaded file paths via puter.fs.delete (recursive)
Progress UI (UIWindowProgress) shown only if operation takes > 500ms (setTimeout guard)
window.actions_history stack drives all undo operations; operation types: create_file, create_folder, upload, copy, move, delete, rename
source_files_analyzed: src/gui/src/helpers.js (lines 1375-1403: downloadFile, 1426-1454: trigger_download, 2586-2684: tarItems+createTar, 2754-2827: untarItem, 2835+: parseTar, 3006-3038: undo_last_action+undo_upload, 2994-3004: delete_item_with_path)
src/gui/src/helpers/open_item.js (trigger_download call for unsupported file type)
